events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bare-hand contact contaminates the lapped mechanical seal faces with skin oils/acids, disrupting the sub-micron flatness needed for proper hydraulic film formation — a known root cause of early seal leakage per SKF/Timken guidance. Verdict: **fail** (high risk) — faces must be cleaned with lint-free wipes/approved solvent (or the seal replaced if etched) and gloves used going forward, before installation proceeds.
